title: Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch
description:
Skyroot Aerospace’s Vikram-1 rocket successfully lifted off on its inaugural flight July 18, becoming the first commercial Indian rocket to reach orbit.
The post Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

description: The potential deal highlights a growing trend of complex, multi-stage funding rounds that mask true entry prices.

description: Autonomous vessel maker Saronic is set to build Port Alpha, a shipyard the company describes as the most advanced in the world, in Texas.

description:
